calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn
Appeal as to judgment on plaintiffs claim entered 6-28-18 against appellant/defendant.

Mariah Robinson, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf

Vladigor Investments Inc DBA Tower Car Wash's representative Steve Matijevich and Jorge Villatoro general manager, Appellants testify on their own behalf

Appellant examined by court.
Respondent examined by court.

The following documentary evidence is introduced on behalf of Respondent:
Photo still shots, video, and cost bill are shown to the Court and admitted.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. All exhibits returned to respective parties.

Judge: Charles F. Haines
Clerk: Don Feinberg
Dept. 505
